comment.body:
bcs the pnl of the 0DTE profile is clearly a customer short RR... and you can see it on the OD heatmap too
but for the speed profile i take other expos into account too and it is a bit different as with speed I aim to see the impact on RV, and on that model, there is supressive downside vol effect relative to the upside

rarely they are diverging, it is one of those occasions. 
but i deleted the line, so it doesn't confuse anybody.
